title: NTG's SkyClient Addons
description: A set of mods to enhance and optimise your experience using SkyClient/1.8 PvP Pack
body:
Enhance your SkyClient and/or 1.8 PvP Pack Experience!

Note: 1.8 PvP Pack doesn't seem to work for me at all, and either way I would probably install a stock SkyClient.

Featuring:
- Not So Essential (removes most of Essential)
- Ksyxis (idk if u'd need this but cant hurt)
- FPS Reducer (good for afk)
- EntityCulling (prob boost fps)
- Controlling (easy keybind changing)
- Resourcify (good for new packs and stuff)

Since this is a small collection of mods, you'll need to add these mods to your SkyClient install. (If prompted, update your mods & replace older files with newer ones)
